caveats: T10-T12 smoke_run.sh wrappers are committed but runtime smokes have NOT been executed — each adapter still needs num_smoke_frames sequence slicing added to its Python entry.
FP env has torch + requirements.txt but mycpp/mycuda C++/CUDA extensions are NOT compiled; run bash third_party/FoundationPose/build_all_conda.sh before T11.
PyPI from the debug container is ~10-20 KB/s; always use pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn as primary index for follow-up installs.
SSH foreground commands drop on long-running installs; use nohup pattern for anything expected to exceed ~10 min.
HaWoR env skips DROID-SLAM + Metric3D (ego-SLAM only); static-camera smokes are unaffected, ego-camera smokes (e.g. HOT3D) would need those re-added.
T9 numeric tests are skipped by default; reference values must be generated via each dataset's OFFICIAL toolkit and pasted before they run.
